vocab.meaning: chế độ tập luyện nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: I adhere to a rigorous workout regime that combines heavy lifting with cardiovascular drills to build functional strength.

vocab.meaning: thực phẩm nguyên bản giàu dinh dưỡng
vocab.example: I try to build my meals around nutrient-dense wholefoods rather than relying on processed snacks or supplements.
To me, health is as much about mental fortitude as it is about physical fitness, so I practice meditation to stay resilient.
I've recently experimented with intermittent fasting to improve my metabolic health and regulate my energy levels throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: lối sống thụ động/ít vận động
vocab.example: Living in a digital age, it is incredibly easy to fall into a sedentary lifestyle, so I make it a point to stand up and stretch every hour.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái sức khỏe tối ưu
vocab.example: Striking a balance between professional ambitions and personal health is essential for long-term optimal well-being.

vocab.meaning: y học phòng ngừa/biện pháp phòng bệnh
vocab.example: I view regular exercise and a balanced diet as a form of preventative medicine to avoid chronic illnesses later in life.

vocab.meaning: vệ sinh giấc ngủ (thói quen để ngủ ngon)
vocab.example: Maintaining good sleep hygiene, such as avoiding screens before bed, is crucial for my body's recovery process.

vocab.meaning: phụ gia thực phẩm đã qua chế biến
vocab.example: I am quite meticulous about checking labels to ensure my food is free from harmful processed additives and preservatives.

vocab.meaning: sự nỗ lực/gắng sức về thể chất
vocab.example: After a long day of mental work, I find that intense physical exertion at the gym is the best way to release stress.
